title: US30 Support & Res AI— 1.8k in a day
author: Actual_Resort1892
selftext:
Built a simple S&R algo on US30 — pulled $1,800 yesterday.

The logic is straightforward:

Pulls 4H and 1H candles (100 bars each)  
Detects local highs/lows using a 5-period rolling window  
Filters out levels within x% of each other to avoid clustering  
Enters BUY when price comes within x% of a support level  
Enters SELL when price comes within x% of a resistance level  
SL sits 1% beyond the level, TP at 2R

Yesterday price dipped hard into the 49,080–49,123 zone — both levels flagged as 4H support. Bot scaled in at two entries, held, exited near 49,385.

No ML, just structures.

Still refining the breakout-retracement logic (when a support breaks, wait for retest from below before entering sell). That part has been pretty noisy.

Working with Claude…

comments.author: znshaon
comments.body: Can you share this code brother
